pokemon:tatsugiri.name: Tatsugiri
pokemon:tatsugiri.summary: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside.
